category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Kimi Code CLI as a terminal AI agent for software development tasks.
source_facts.description says this is a CLI agent for the MoonshotAI Kimi platform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kimi-cli; official GitHub README uses Kimi Code CLI/Kimi CLI naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links to the GitHub Pages documentation site; README is the official fallback documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official MoonshotAI GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify a terminal CLI AI/coding agent.
